title: Sonic Splash Texts
description: Sonic Splash Texts is a resource pack that adds Sonic‑styled splash texts to the title screen!
body:
**Sonic Splash Texts** is a resource pack that replaces Minecraft’s default splash texts with Sonic‑styled ones.

This resource pack features:
- Tons of Sonic references in the splash texts
- And a ton of speed

List of Splash Texts:
Super Sonic style!
We're Sonic Heroes!
Aw yeah, this is happenin'!
I'll play with you some other time!
You're too slow!
Chaos Control!!
Minecraft: Sonic Edition!
C'mon, step it up!  
Now I'll show you!
& Knuckles

NEW:
What I'm Made Of!
Live & Learn!
He's got the Master Plan!
Gotta go fast!

How to Install:
1. Download the latest version of Sonic Splash Texts.
2. Open the Minecraft Launcher and press Play.
3. Go to Options then Resource Packs.
4. Press Open Pack Folder (should be around bottom left).
5. Drag and drop the Sonic Splash Texts resource pack into that folder.
6. Restart Minecraft.

If you did everything correctly, the new splash texts will appear!
